0.response: {"Q0":"I mean, I followed the strategy outlined, like if the red astronaut went away I didn't dig on that planet etc. I don't think I did anything that wasn't outlined outside of not clicking the green/frozen gems in the meteor shower if one of the planets was excluded as the ratio to finding the gem I needed was 1/3 to gain 10 coins vs 2/3 to lose 10."}

7.response: {"Q0":"EV and then sometimes I would misclick when the time changed and it got quicker, so it didn't really matter seemingly."}

5.response: {"Q0":"No, there is no point as I wouldn't earn any gems."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I would guess roughly a third of the time I found gems."}

6.response: {"Q0":"No, I wouldn't earn any gold from the gems."}

8.response: {"Q0":"No, I think I focused equally on parts of the task."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes you kind of have to acknowledge it as you're forced to type three random letters to proceed."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, again you were forced to type three random letters to acknowledge that the astronaut was leaving."}

11.response: {"Q0":"Everything ran smoothly, the only thing I would advise on changing is when asked the comprehension questions after the instructions instead of having to go through the entire thing again adding a quick drop down/glossary of the instructions."}
